expectations.text: Defines a complete map-to-battle-to-reward-to-boss vertical slice with explicit exclusions.
expectations.evidence: Defines a complete route/combat/reward/boss run and a dedicated list of excluded v1 features.

expectations.text: Invents a desert/mechanical second construction axis that changes decisions rather than only adding stats.
expectations.evidence: The instruction deck × wheel-chain system makes card order and stored pulse timing matter.

expectations.text: Separates profile state from run state and addresses save schema migration.
expectations.evidence: Separates profile and run and stores schemaVersion, but only says incompatible saves should show a warning; no concrete migration path or defaults are provided.

expectations.text: Includes click/target/cancel interaction contracts and multi-target behavior.
expectations.evidence: Includes click-card/click-target and Escape cancellation, but does not specify multi-target selection behavior or a multi-enemy target validation case.

expectations.text: Includes mobile height and breakpoint tests, public deployment verification, and cache busting.
expectations.evidence: Has a useful viewport list and HTTPS public check, but lacks breakpoint ±1px coverage, deployed-commit verification and cache-busting validation.

expectations.text: Avoids nautical, rust, tide, and copied Slay the Spire expression.
expectations.evidence: Uses original desert mechanical-city terms and explicitly avoids copied expression.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions are substantive and expose differences in migration, multi-target, and release discipline.
